itinerary.title: Punjab Heritage Tour
itinerary.overview:
PUNJAB HERITAGE TOUR • THE LAND OF FIVE RIVERS & ETERNAL ROYALTY

Welcome to a glorious immersive journey curated exclusively by TRAGUIN. Experience the true essence of vibrancy, spirituality, and timeless history with our definitive Punjab Family Tour. As your elite travel consultants, TRAGUIN presents a beautifully detailed exploration into the majestic past, sacred shrines, and architectural treasures of Punjab. From the absolute spiritual serenity of the Golden Temple to the French-inspired royal courts of Kapurthala, this luxury holiday is meticulously planned with premium stays, scenic beauty, and authentic cultural touchpoints to present you with unforgettable memories.

TOUR OVERVIEW
This custom-tailored heritage itinerary offers an unmatched opportunity to explore the historical, spiritual, and artistic legacies of Northern India. Travelling in a completely private premium AC vehicle managed by a professional, highly courteous chauffeur, your journey seamlessly blends majestic forts with bustling local bazaars. Enjoy a meticulously designed meal plan featuring lavish daily breakfasts and rich traditional Punjabi dinners. Every element of your trip carries the signature touch of TRAGUIN curated experiences, assuring absolute comfort, private local insights, and round-the-clock bespoke assistance.

WHY CHOOSE THE BEST PUNJAB TOUR PACKAGE?
When shortlisting a Luxury Punjab Holiday, discerning world travellers look for meaningful encounters with rich culinary traditions, military prestige, and deep spiritual legacy. Punjab provides access to some of the most iconic attractions in the world. The holy Harmandir Sahib (Golden Temple) remains a centerpiece of global faith, serving as an exceptional location for a highly memorable Punjab Honeymoon Package or an enriching Punjab Family Tour. From witnessing the highly patriotic beating retreat ceremony at the Wagah Border to discovering the breathtaking landscapes of lush yellow mustard fields, Punjab sightseeing captures the imagination. Visitors can capture stunning shots at popular Instagram locations like the historic Jallianwala Bagh, the majestic Gobindgarh Fort, and the exquisite French-style palaces of Kapurthala. Whether you want to enjoy intense traditional shopping, explore centuries-old military heritage, or visit ancient structures, our specialized TRAGUIN Punjab Packages ensure handpicked hotels, exclusive experiences, and seamless execution during the absolute best time to visit Punjab.
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Punjab package (PB-004 / TRG-PUB-004): Amritsar • Wagah Border • Kapurthala • Jalandhar with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AMRITSAR — WELCOME TO THE SPIRITUAL CAPITAL – DIVINE EVENING PRAYERS
Day 02: AMRITSAR CITY SIGHTSEEING TO WAGAH BORDER — HISTORIC SACRIFICES & HIGH-OCTANE MILITARY PATRIOTISM
Day 03: AMRITSAR TO KAPURTHALA HERITAGE EXPEDITION — THE PARIS OF PUNJAB – FRENCH ARCHITECTURE & ROYAL COURTS
Day 04: JALANDHAR EXPEDITION & RURAL HERITAGE IMMERSION — EXPLORING CRAFTSMANSHIP, FOLK CULTURE & BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES
Day 05: DEPARTURE VIA AMRITSAR / DELHI — CHERISHING THE MEMORIES OF LAND OF COPIOUS HOSPITALITY
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private family historical briefing before entering the partition museum galleries.
Curated by TRAGUIN Experts: Custom routing designed to avoid congestion during peak hours near the Wagah Border highway.
Premium Handpicked Hotels: Accommodations selected based on their history, luxury ratings, safety, and excellent reviews.
Luxury Transportation: Expert drivers providing reliable and safe long-distance transit across state highways.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AMRITSAR — WELCOME TO THE SPIRITUAL CAPITAL – DIVINE EVENING PRAYERS
days.description: Your premium Punjab experience begins with a grand welcome at Amritsar Airport or Railway Station by your private luxury transport chauffeur. Transfer to your handpicked premium luxury hotel and unwind. In the late afternoon, embark on an emotionally moving visit to the legendary Golden Temple. Witness the golden domes reflecting beautifully in the sacred Amrit Sarovar tank. Stay to absorb the spiritual atmosphere during the evening Palki Sahib ceremony.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Harmandir Sahib (Golden Temple), Divine Pool Walkway, Evening Palki Sahib Ceremony.
Evening Experience: Aromatic traditional dining at a premium authentic culinary house curated by TRAGUIN experts.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium / Luxury Selected Heritage Property)
Meals Included: Welcome Mocktail & Gourmet Traditional Dinner

days.title: AMRITSAR CITY SIGHTSEEING TO WAGAH BORDER — HISTORIC SACRIFICES & HIGH-OCTANE MILITARY PATRIOTISM
days.description: After a delicious breakfast, pay a solemn visit to the historic Jallianwala Bagh to honor the martyrs of freedom. Next, explore the grand Partition Museum, which stands as a deeply moving repository of historical memories. In the afternoon, take a scenic drive to the Wagah Border to witness the legendary international Border Beating Retreat Ceremony. Feel the intense patriotic energy, loud cheers, and precise military choreography before returning to the city for local shopping.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jallianwala Bagh Memorial, Partition Museum, Wagah Border International Outpost.
Optional Activities: A late-night street-food walk through the old city to enjoy authentic Amritsari Kulchas with extra butter.
Overnight Stay: Amritsar (Premium / Luxury Selected Heritage Property)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Luxury Buffer Dinner

days.title: AMRITSAR TO KAPURTHALA HERITAGE EXPEDITION — THE PARIS OF PUNJAB – FRENCH ARCHITECTURE & ROYAL COURTS
days.description: Depart Amritsar after a hearty breakfast and travel to the majestic princely state of Kapurthala, fondly called the 'Paris of Punjab'. Admire the spectacular Jagatjit Palace, inspired by the Palace of Versailles in France. Explore the beautiful Elysee Palace, the unique Moorish Mosque built by a French architect, and the stunning Shalimar Gardens. This city offers popular Instagram locations for capturing unique heritage portraits.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jagatjit Palace Exterior, Moorish Mosque, Elysee Palace Grounds, Panch Mandir.
Evening Experience: Private luxury high-tea experience overlooking the grand lawns of a local heritage estate.
Overnight Stay: Kapurthala / Jalandhar (Premium Boutique Hotel Stay)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Royal Mughlai Dinner

days.title: JALANDHAR EXPEDITION & RURAL HERITAGE IMMERSION — EXPLORING CRAFTSMANSHIP, FOLK CULTURE & BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES
days.description: Spend your day diving into the cultural richness of Jalandhar. Explore the sacred Devi Talab Mandir and learn about the local arts at the Wonders of Punjab exhibition galleries. In the afternoon, enjoy an immersive experience at an authentic luxury model village heritage farm. Walk through vibrant yellow mustard fields, take a tractor ride, and enjoy live folk music performances.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Devi Talab Mandir, Jalandhar Traditional Bazaars, Heritage Farm Estate.
Optional Activities: Hands-on pottery making and learning traditional Bhangra drum rhythms.
Overnight Stay: Jalandhar (Premium / Luxury Corporate Business Property)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Traditional Farm-to-Table Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE VIA AMRITSAR / DELHI — CHERISHING THE MEMORIES OF LAND OF COPIOUS HOSPITALITY
days.description: Indulge in a final lavish breakfast featuring fresh lassi and traditional paranthas. Your private luxury transport will comfortably escort you back to Amritsar International Airport or Jalandhar Railway station for your journey back home. Bid farewell to the warm hospitality of Punjab, carrying sweet unforgettable memories designed elegantly by TRAGUIN.
activities: Transfers Included: Private luxury doorstep transit to airport or station.
